operations.command:
uv run python -c "
from liquidity.collectors import registry, FedCustodyCollector

# Check registry
print('Registered collectors:', registry.list_collectors())
assert 'fed_custody' in registry.list_collectors(), 'fed_custody not registered'

# Get and instantiate
collector_cls = registry.get('fed_custody')
assert collector_cls is FedCustodyCollector, 'Wrong class returned'

collector = collector_cls()
assert collector.name == 'fed_custody', 'Wrong name'

print('Registry integration: OK')
print(f'Collector: {collector}')
"

operations.command:
uv run python -c "
import asyncio
from liquidity.collectors.risk_etfs import RiskETFCollector

async def main():
    collector = RiskETFCollector()
    df = await collector.collect_current_shares(etfs=['SPY', 'TLT'])
    print(df[['etf', 'shares_outstanding']].to_string())
    
    spy_shares = df[df['etf'] == 'SPY']['shares_outstanding'].values[0]
    tlt_shares = df[df['etf'] == 'TLT']['shares_outstanding'].values[0]
    print(f'\nSPY shares: {spy_shares:,.0f}')
    print(f'TLT shares: {tlt_shares:,.0f}')
    print(f'Ratio: {spy_shares/tlt_shares:.2f}')

asyncio.run(main())
" 2>&1 | grep -v "UserWarning\|DeprecationWarning\|PydanticDeprecated\|Pandas4Warning"

operations.command:
uv run python -c "
import asyncio
from liquidity.collectors.tic import TICCollector

async def test():
    c = TICCollector()
    df = await c.collect_major_holders()
    if df.empty:
        print('No data returned')
    else:
        print(f'Records: {len(df)}')
        print(f'Columns: {df.columns.tolist()}')
        print()
        print(df.to_string())
        print()
        
        # Check Japan and China
        japan = await c.get_japan_holdings()
        china = await c.get_china_holdings()
        print(f'Japan holdings: {japan:,.0f} million USD' if japan else 'Japan: N/A')
        print(f'China holdings: {china:,.0f} million USD' if china else 'China: N/A')

asyncio.run(test())
" 2>&1

operations.description: List modified Python files for complexity check
Check git status for all changes

operations.command:
for f in src/liquidity/collectors/{tic,fed_custody,stress,risk_etfs,cofer}.py; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    lines=$(wc -l < "$f")
    funcs=$(grep -cE '^\s*(def |async def |class )' "$f" || echo 0)
    echo "$f: $lines lines, $funcs functions/classes"
  fi
done
operations.description: Check file complexity for new collectors

operations.command:
for f in src/liquidity/collectors/{fred,etf_flows,sofr}.py; do
  lines=$(wc -l < "$f")
  funcs=$(grep -cE '^\s*(def |async def |class )' "$f" || echo 0)
  echo "$f: $lines lines, $funcs functions/classes"
done
